articles.title: Chrome on Android now supports approximate instead of precise location sharing
articles.description: The new feature is a small win for Android users, as it gives them more control over how much location data they share with websites.

articles.title: Google updates AI search to include ‘expert advice’ from Reddit and other web forums
articles.description: While citing web forums and discussion boards can help users find answers to more niche queries, this design choice could also prove chaotic.

articles.title: Khosla-backed robotics startup Genesis AI has gone full-stack, demo shows
articles.description: Genesis AI, a startup that raised a $105 million seed round to build foundational AI for robotics, has unveiled its first model, GENE-26.5, but also a demo showcasing a set of robotic hands performing complex tasks.

articles.title: Tinder owner Match Group is slowing hiring to pay for its increased use of AI tools
articles.description: Match Group said that it's slowing its hiring plans for the rest of the year because AI tools "cost a lot of money."

articles.title: Apple to pay $250M to settle lawsuit over Siri’s delayed AI features
articles.description: Apple has agreed to pay $250 million to settle a class action lawsuit for overpromising the arrival of Siri's AI features.

articles.title: Ethos raises $22.75M from a16z for its expert network with voice onboarding
articles.description: Ethos says it is onboarding 35,000 experts per week.

articles.title: Aurora lands McLane deal to run driverless truck routes in Texas
articles.description: Aurora said it plans to expand to new routes between McLane distribution centers across the U.S. Sun Belt by the end of 2026.

articles.title: At TechCrunch Disrupt 2026, all your M&A questions will be answered
articles.description: Leaders from Coinbase, M13, and Mignano Law Group talk about how M&A is an early-stage strategy at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Register to hear this live.

articles.title: 3 days left to lock in 50% off a second ticket to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
articles.description: Three days left to lock in 50% off a second ticket to Disrupt 2026. Buy one TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket, and get a second ticket at 50% off. Gain more visibility in the tech industry. Offer ends May 8 at 11:59 p.m. PT.

articles.title: AI boom pushes Samsung to $1T
articles.description: Samsung crossed the $1 trillion valuation mark after shares surged on AI-driven chip demand, making it only the second Asian company after TSMC to hit the milestone.

articles.title: Some kids are bypassing age verification checks with a fake mustache
articles.description: A new survey found that kids find it easy to bypass age checks, despite a rise in age verification laws around the world.

articles.title: reMarkable’s new Paper Pure tablet goes back to basics with a monochrome screen
articles.description: The new Paper Pure is lighter and faster than the reMarkable 2, which is going to be retired six years since its launch.

articles.title: Peter Sarlin’s QuTwo reaches $380M valuation in angel round
articles.description: QuTwo, the Finnish AI lab founded by former AMD Silo AI CEO Peter Sarlin, is now valued at €325 million (approximately $380 million) after raising a €25 million angel round ($29 million). It's a sign of enduring tailwinds for AI, quantum computing, and sovereign tech, especially for Europe-made companies.

articles.title: Marc Lore says that AI will soon enable anyone open a restaurant
articles.description: Wonder wants to turn its robotic kitchens into AI-powered “restaurant factories,” letting anyone spin up a virtual food brand with a prompt.

articles.title: Nuro receives driverless testing permit ahead of Uber robotaxi service launch
articles.description: The Silicon Valley AV startup has not started driverless testing yet.

articles.title: SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw
articles.description: SAP plans to buy German AI startup Prior Labs and invest heavily in it. It is also prohibiting customers' agents use to a select few like Nvidia's NemoClaw.

articles.title: Bumble’s paying users are slipping as it bets on an overhaul later this year
articles.description: The company is making a big bet that the swiping model is outdated and most matches never turn into actual dates. The company wants to fix that by redesigning profiles, changing how people interact, and focusing a lot more on getting users to meet in real life.

articles.title: Altara secures $7M to bridge the data gap that’s slowing down physical sciences
articles.description: Altara’s AI aims to diagnose failures and help speed up R&D by unifying data siloed across spreadsheets and legacy systems.

articles.title: Lucid Motors doesn’t know how many EVs it will build this year
articles.description: Lucid Motors pulled its guidance for the year, as it navigates swelling inventory and a companywide cost-cutting measure.

articles.title: As crypto cools, a16z crypto raises a $2.2B fund
articles.description: As some of the biggest VCs in crypto start to consider funding AI startups, a16z crypto's new fund will stay the course.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **谷歌更新AI搜索**：引入来自Reddit等网络论坛的“专家建议”，以提升搜索结果的信息丰富度。  
2. **AI应用与行业影响**：三星因AI热潮市值突破1万亿美元；Tinder母公司Match Group放缓招聘以增加AI工具投入；苹果就Siri AI功能延迟达成2.5亿美元和解。  
3. **自动驾驶与机器人进展**：Aurora与McLane合作在得州运营无人驾驶卡车路线；Nuro获无人驾驶测试许可，为Uber机器人出租车服务铺路；Khosla支持的机器人公司Genesis AI展示全栈技术。  
4. **初创企业融资与创新**：专家网络平台Ethos获a16z 2275万美元融资；QuTwo在天使轮估值达3.8亿美元；Marc Lore预测AI将降低餐饮创业门槛。  
5. **其他科技动态**：Chrome安卓版支持近似位置分享替代精确位置；reMarkable推出黑白屏平板Paper Pure回归极简；部分儿童用假胡子绕过年龄验证。  

**最值得关注的发展**：AI技术正全面渗透搜索、自动驾驶、机器人及企业运营，同时推动资本市场对科技巨头的估值攀升，但隐私与信任问题（如Siri延迟、儿童绕过验证）仍待解决。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **OpenAI发布GPT-5.5 Instant**：推出更智能、更清晰、更个性化的新模型，并发布系统卡，同时宣布与普华永道合作重塑CFO办公室，以及推出低延迟语音AI、高级账户安全等多项更新。
2. **Hugging Face更新ASR排行榜**：新增“Benchmaxxer Repellant”机制，旨在提升语音识别模型评测的公平性和抗作弊能力。
3. **谷歌AI动态**：推出搜索内园艺技巧功能、发起350万美元未来愿景电影竞赛，并总结2026年4月AI新闻，同时通过Webhooks在Gemini API中降低长任务延迟与摩擦。
4. **前沿企业AI优势与大规模训练网络**：OpenAI博客探讨企业如何构建AI竞争优势，并介绍基于多路径可靠连接（MRC）解锁大规模AI训练网络的技术进展。
5. **AI PPT工具实现零返工**：量子位报道称，最新AI PPT工具已大幅提升生成质量，用户无需再手动修改。

**今日最值得关注的是OpenAI密集发布GPT-5.5 Instant系列更新，包括模型升级、企业合作与安全增强，标志着其在大模型应用与商业化上的全面提速。**

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. 美国华盛顿特区一场庆典活动中发生枪击事件，嫌疑人通过家书表达对美国政府的不满，相关情况已由媒体报道。
2. 事件引发对美社会治安状况及民众情绪的关注，凸显美国内部矛盾与治理问题。
3. 国际舆论持续关注此案，折射美国社会深层分裂与暴力事件频发的现状。

今日最值得关注的发展：美国庆典枪击案嫌疑人直指政府不满，暴露美式治理困境与社会撕裂加剧。
